name: VERTIN 16
description: A prescription medicine used for treatment of Meniere's disease, an inner ear condition that causes dizziness, vertigo, tinnitus, hearing loss, and balance problems.
dosage: As prescribed by doctor; typically 2-3 times daily.
storageInstructions: Does not require specific storage conditions. Keep away from children and pets.

name: STUGERON PLUS TAB
description: A medication used to treat vertigo, which causes dizziness, spinning sensations, nausea, and vomiting.
uses: Nausea and vomiting associated with vertigo
storageInstructions: Store in a cool and dry place, away from direct sunlight.

name: STEMTIL MD 1*15 TAB
description: Used to treat nausea, vomiting, post-operative and migraine-induced vomiting by blocking dopamine receptors in the brain.
dosage: Take as advised by your doctor; tablet dissolves in the mouth.
storageInstructions: Do not store above 25°C. Store in original package to protect from light.

name: ONDEM MD 8 40*10
description: Used to control nausea and vomiting. Contains ondansetron, an antiemetic medicine.
uses: Preventing/managing nausea and vomiting from chemotherapy
Managing nausea and vomiting from radiotherapy
Relieving symptoms before and after surgeries
dosage: As determined by your doctor; take as a whole with water, with or without food.
storageInstructions: Store in the original packaging. Keep out of reach of children and pets.

name: ONDEM SYP
description: Anti-emetic medicine used in children to prevent nausea and vomiting caused by chemotherapy, radiotherapy, and surgery.
dosage: Doctor-determined based on child's age and body weight.
storageInstructions: Store at room temperature, away from light and moisture.

name: EMSET SYP 1*30ML
description: Contains ondansetron; used to control nausea and vomiting, specially designed for use in children.
uses: Pre and post-operative nausea and vomiting
dosage: The dose and duration will be decided by the paediatrician based on the child's age, body weight and severity of the condition.
storageInstructions: Keep the medicine away from children and pets.

name: ZENTEL SRP
description: Anti-worm medicine used to treat infections caused by worms in the stomach and intestine.
storageInstructions: Keep in a dry place below 30°C. Protect from direct sunlight.
